title: Lucidus
body:
### Lucidus Shader
#### NOTE: I'm busy, so maybe update is slow....

#### If You have issues...
##### >> [Report Here!](https://github.com/tsyqax/Reticidus)

---
Lucidus is an ultra-lightweight shader optimized for maximum performance.  
This shader achieved 120 FPS on Iris when 180 FPS without shaders.  
Settings is non-existance due to a "less is more" approach. 

Key features include:
* **Dynamic Lighting:** Smooth, real-time handheld light sources.
* **Warm Atmosphere:** A subtle, cozy tint for a better visual vibe.
* **Extreme Compatibility:** Runs flawlessly even on "potato PCs."

Simple, fast, and ready to play.  

+) I recommand to use "Smooth Light Effect".
